title: Macrame Hanging Shelf
excerpt: Combine functionality with boho style by creating this beautiful macrame hanging shelf.

steps.title: Prepare shelf
steps.description: Sand the wooden board smooth and drill holes in each corner, 2cm from edges.

steps.title: Cut and attach cords
steps.description: Cut 4 long cords and attach to the hanging ring, then thread through shelf holes.

steps.title: Secure the shelf
steps.description: Create knots below the shelf to hold it level, checking with a spirit level.

steps.title: Decorate and finish
steps.description: Add decorative knots above and below the shelf, finish with a tassel.

tips: Stain or paint the wood to match your decor
Add multiple shelves for a tiered look
